x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CSM SLAs provide urgency signals Now Assist uses for AI-driven case prioritization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure CSM SLAs for each case type and customer tier. Target: 5+ active SLA definitions. Now Assist CSM uses SLA breach risk for AI case prioritization.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[CSM SLAs provide urgency signals Now Assist uses for AI-driven case prioritization.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>CSM SLA Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sla');
    ga.addQuery('table', 'CONTAINS', 'sn_customerservice');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active CSM SLA definitions';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active CSM SLAs. Now Assist CSM can prioritize cases using AI-driven SLA breach risk analysis.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active CSM SLA(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist CSM SLA-based AI prioritization will have limited differentiation across case types and customer tiers.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active CSM SLAs defined. Now Assist CSM cannot differentiate case urgency for AI prioritization without SLA definitions.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CSM</module>
<number>CHK0006043</number>
<order>60</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure CSM SLAs for each case type and customer tier. Target: 5+ active SLA definitions. Now Assist CSM uses SLA breach risk for AI case prioritization.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8d</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
